headline: Q1 Earnings Highlights: NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) Vs The Rest Of The Analog Semiconductors Stocks
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q1 behind us, let’s have a look at NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) and its peers.
